pr.title: PR #134 — Execution Resource Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

Adds the **resource layer** of the execution roadmap (`Execution Context = State → Execution Environment = Location → Execution Resource = Requirements`). Captures *what resources execution requires* as a deterministic, append-only report — observational/declarative only, no allocation/provisioning/scheduling/orchestration/optimization per non-goals. Upstream `ExecutionContext` / `ExecutionEnvironment` / `CapabilityKnowledgeGraph` are consumed read-only; nothing is mutated.

Mirrors the Execution Environment Framework (PR #133) exactly, with the resource-specific shape:

- `ExecutionResource(resource_id, context_id, environment_id, capability_id, resource_type, status, requirements, summary, created_at, schema_version, raw_payload)`
- `ExecutionResourceType` ∈ `CPU/MEMORY/STORAGE/NETWORK/GPU/REPOSITORY/TOOL/SOFTWARE/CREDENTIAL/OTHER`; `ExecutionResourceStatus` ∈ `AVAILABLE/UNAVAILABLE/DEGRADED/UNKNOWN`
- `ExecutionResourceRequirement(requirement_id, requirement_type, requirement_value, summary)` — free-form type, required `type`+`value`
- `ExecutionResourceReport(report_id, resource_count, resource_type_counts, status_counts, unavailable_count, degraded_count, requirement_count, duplicate_resource_count, created_at)`
- `ExecutionResourceEvidence` + `ExecutionResourceEngine`

Engine behavior:

```
create(resources, raw_metadata):
  build+validate+normalize (type/status upper-cased)
  sort by (context_id, environment_id, capability_id, resource_type, status, resource_id)
  dedupe key = (context_id, environment_id, capability_id, resource_type)  # keep first
  aggregate resource_type_counts / status_counts (sorted), requirement_count = sum(len(reqs))
  unavailable_count / degraded_count from status_counts
  persist report.json + 4-file evidence bundle  # always written
passed = resource_count > 0 and unavailable_count == 0 and degraded_count == 0
```

CLI (`execution-resource-create / execution-resources / execution-resource-show / execution-resource-export`), JSON/Markdown/CSV exports, 4-file bundle under `artifacts/execution_resource/<run_id>/` (`execution_resource_request.json`, `execution_resource_result.json`, `execution_resource_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json`). Registered in the runner command registry (READ_ONLY / SAFE) and the test-selection map.

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **4528 passed, 1 skipped** (+51; baseline 4477 at #133)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → **0 errors**
- CLI smoke (adversarial: 4 resources, 1 case-insensitive duplicate `(ctx-1,env-1,cap-1,MEMORY)`, 1 UNAVAILABLE, 1 DEGRADED, lowercase types/statuses, out-of-order requirements) → resource_count 3 / duplicate 1 / unavailable 1 / degraded 1 / requirement_count 2; sorted status+type counts; requirements ordered `arch → min_gb`


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
pr.author: plamen-dev
